name: capable-wealth
description: Content production harness for Capable Wealth (Jared Paul, CFP) — financial content for orthopedic surgeons. Seven skills that load the brand context, enforce every production rule, gate quality, and produce on-voice content. Invoke a skill by name, e.g. /generate-batch, /validate, /linkedin-check. Requires the Project to be linked to the capable_wealth folder (brand/, rules/, src/, outputs/) for the skills to read the brand docs.
